pi_items.source: Direct file count verification: ./examples/bluemail_env/assets/emails/ham/ contains exactly 50 ham_*.eml files; setup_task.sh line 36 breaks loop at idx >= 50; verified via ls command

Email content analysis and web search (https://spamassassin.apache.org/old/publiccorpus/). Email headers show historical dates (2002) and domain names consistent with SpamAssassin corpus. Example emails from exmh-workers@spamassassin.taint.org, spamassassin-talk@sourceforge.net mailing lists
SpamAssassin public corpus is a real dataset of actual emails from 2002, publicly available at https://spamassassin.apache.org/old/publiccorpus/. Not generated or synthetic.

pi_items.verified_value: From, Subject, Date present in all checked emails
pi_items.source: Python verification script checked 10 ham emails and 5 spam emails. All (100%) contained From:, Subject:, and Date: headers required for manifest creation.
Direct file count: ./examples/bluemail_env/assets/emails/spam/ contains exactly 20 spam_*.eml files; setup_task.sh line 49 loads spam with loop breaking at 20

pi_items.verified_value: Emails span multiple categories: Technical (SpamAssassin dev/talk, ILUG tech), General Discussion (zzzzteana), Mailing lists from various domains
pi_items.source: Subject line extraction from ham emails 001-020 shows diverse topics suitable for folder organization: [SAtalk], [SAdev], [ILUG], [IRR], [IIU], [zzzzteana] prefixes indicate different list/category origins

privileged_info_summary: The task will present exactly 50 real emails from the SpamAssassin public corpus (dated 2002) in the inbox. All emails contain proper headers (From, Subject, Date) required for manifest creation. The emails span diverse categories including technical mailing lists (SpamAssassin dev/talk, ILUG), general discussion groups, and other topics, making them suitable for categorization into multiple folders. Additionally, 20 real spam emails from the same corpus will be loaded into the Junk folder. The data is not synthetic but sourced from the publicly available SpamAssassin dataset.
